rows.description: Computus Gu: Paynser Rectory a secundo die Novembris 1703, ad eundem diem 1704.
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms this is a single logical header spanning two lines, with no monetary amounts. Description chosen from gemini-flash for best transcription. gpt-5-mini split this into two rows, claude-haiku had minor transcription errors.

rows.description: Imprimis reddidit comput. de remanentib' in Cista
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms this is a header with no amounts. Extracted from gemini-flash which is correct. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned an amount, claude-haiku merged it with the next header description.

Visual verification confirms this is a header with no amounts. Extracted from gemini-flash which is correct. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned an amount, claude-haiku completely missed it as a separate header.

Description 'Guanear' taken from gemini-flash. Amounts £11 9s 4d confirmed by all extractors. The 'b' character after '4' is not a standard fraction (0.25, 0.5, 0.75) and is interpreted as a flourish or non-monetary mark, aligning with gemini-flash's and gpt-5-mini's notes. Claude-haiku incorrectly identified 'b' as 'ob' (0.5).
Description 'Longwitnam' from gemini-flash. Amounts £60 0s 0d are clear in the image and extracted correctly by gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku misread pounds as 6.

Description 'minhinnett' from gemini-flash. Amounts £76 13s 4d visually confirmed from the image and extracted correctly by gpt-5-mini (though gpt-5-mini misaligned the description). Gemini-flash incorrectly read shillings and pence as 0 0, and claude-haiku misread all amounts.

Description 'Southnewington pro mici' (from gemini-flash, best transcription of 'pro mici'). Visual verification confirms amounts are £20 0s 0d, matching gpt-5-mini's numerical reading (though it misaligned description). Gemini-flash incorrectly assigned shillings/pence from the previous entry.
Description 'Merton' from gemini-flash. Amounts £30 0s 0d visually confirmed and extracted correctly by gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku misread pounds as 3.

Visual verification confirms no amounts for this row. Description 'Chockhill' from gemini-flash. Gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini correctly identified the lack of amounts for the corresponding description (gpt-5-mini had minor transcription error, claude-haiku was misaligned).

Description 'Thrup' and amounts £3 0s 8 1/4d visually confirmed. Extracted from gemini-flash which correctly identified the 'q' as 0.25 (farthing). Gpt-5-mini missed the fraction. Claude-haiku was misaligned and missed amounts for this row.

Visual verification confirms this is a header with no amounts. Description 'Sue quitrents' read from image (gemini-flash had 'Tue'). Gpt-5-mini misidentified as an entry with amounts, claude-haiku was misaligned and missed it entirely.

Description 'Ralph marshally capons' read from image (gemini-flash had 'marshall's'). Amounts £2 15s 7d visually confirmed and extracted correctly by gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku was misaligned and had invalid pence (15d).
Visual verification confirms no amounts for this row. Description from gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku were misaligned, incorrectly extracting amounts or invalid amounts for this row.
Description 'Bampton' from gemini-flash. Amounts £3 8s 11d visually confirmed and extracted correctly by gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku was misaligned and missed the pence value.
Description 'Mountaoue' from gemini-flash. Amounts £4 0s 0d visually confirmed and extracted correctly by gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Claude-haiku was misaligned and had incorrect amounts.
Visual verification confirms no amounts for this row. Description from gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku were misaligned, incorrectly extracting amounts for this row.

Description 'Greeneuay' from gemini-flash. Amounts £1 12s 0d visually confirmed and extracted correctly by gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini (though gpt-5-mini had a misaligned description). Claude-haiku was misaligned and missed amounts.

Description 'Walker' from gemini-flash. Amounts 0s 10d visually confirmed and extracted correctly by gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini (though gpt-5-mini had a misaligned description). Claude-haiku was misaligned and had invalid pence (12d).

Description 'Minne' from gemini-flash. Amounts 0s 15d visually confirmed and extracted correctly by gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini (though gpt-5-mini had a misaligned description). Claude-haiku was misaligned and had incorrect amounts (10d or 15d invalid).

Visual verification confirms no amounts for this row. Description from gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini also correctly identified no amounts for its corresponding (misaligned) row. Claude-haiku was misaligned and incorrectly extracted an amount.

Visual verification confirms no amounts for this row. Description from gemini-flash. Claude-haiku also correctly identified no amounts for its corresponding (misaligned) row. Gpt-5-mini was misaligned and incorrectly extracted an amount.

Description 'Tintinhull Napper' visually read. Amounts £2 5s 5 1/4d visually confirmed. Extracted from gemini-flash's R22 (description 'Tintinhull Nopper', correct amounts and fraction). Gpt-5-mini was confused by the bracketed entry, extracting multiple rows with inconsistent readings. Claude-haiku misread 'Tintinhull' and the fraction.

Description 'Hopkins' from gemini-flash. Amounts £1 18s 7d visually confirmed and extracted correctly by gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. The dot after 18 is a separator, not part of a fraction. Claude-haiku had invalid pence (18d) and misread pounds.

Visual verification confirms no amounts for this row. Description from gemini-flash. Claude-haiku also correctly identified no amounts for its corresponding row (minor typo). Gpt-5-mini misidentified as having amounts.

Description 'Bensington' from gemini-flash. Amounts £3 19s 8d visually confirmed and extracted correctly by gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini (though gpt-5-mini had a misaligned description). Claude-haiku had invalid pence (19d) and misread pounds.

Description 'Brewhouse' from gemini-flash. Amounts £1 15s 6d visually confirmed and extracted correctly by gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini (though gpt-5-mini had a misaligned description). Claude-haiku had invalid pence (15d) and misread pounds.

Description 'Tretbewin' from gemini-flash. Amounts £6 9s 7d visually confirmed and extracted correctly by gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini (gpt-5-mini had minor typo 'Trelhewin'). Claude-haiku misread pounds, pence (as 9), and added an incorrect fraction.
Consensus among all extractors on description, row type (entry with no amounts), and lack of monetary values. Visually confirmed.

Consensus on total amounts £230 13s 8d, and row type. Description 'Summa Annosragionum' chosen from gemini-flash as the best interpretation of the faded text compared to gpt-5-mini's over-interpretation and claude-haiku's typos.
